'''Zyn Javeb''' was a [[Pau'an/Legends|Pau'an]] who, during the last [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], was a lesser [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Port Administrator/Legends|Port Administrator]]<ref name="Databank">{{DB|character|tionmedon|Medon, Tion}}</ref> [[Tion Medon/Legends|Tion Medon]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Javeb was one of the committee members that joined Medon on the landing platform to welcome [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. Despite his menacing appearance, he was an aiding and helpful being.
